hypothesis: If a diffusion-based generative model incorporates non-negativity and sum-to-one regularization terms (with appropriate weights α1 and α2) into its loss, then it will generate composite material compositions that have significantly higher Validityreg and Validityfab while maintaining comparable fidelity (density) and diversity (coverage) to CVAE and TabDDPM because enforcing physics constraints during training guides the model toward physically plausible regions of composition space.
